mission.title: Install and Configure Kubeflow on Kubernetes
mission.description: Kubeflow is a powerful Machine Learning Toolkit for Kubernetes, designed to support the entire AI lifecycle. Installing Kubeflow provides a modular, scalable, and extensible platform for AI practitioners and developers.

steps.title: Clone the Kubeflow manifests
steps.description:
Clone the official Kubeflow manifests repository:
```bash
git clone --branch v1.9.1 https://github.com/kubeflow/manifests.git
cd manifests
```

steps.title: Install Kubeflow with kustomize
steps.description:
Deploy the full Kubeflow platform:
```bash
while ! kustomize build example | kubectl apply -f -; do echo 'Retrying...'; sleep 20; done
```
This installs all Kubeflow components. The retry loop handles CRD ordering dependencies.

steps.title: Wait for all pods to be ready
steps.description:
Kubeflow deploys many components. Wait for them to be ready:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubeflow --watch
kubectl get pods -n istio-system --watch
kubectl get pods -n auth --watch
```

steps.title: Access the Kubeflow dashboard
steps.description:
Port-forward to access the central dashboard:
```bash
kubectl port-forward svc/istio-ingressgateway -n istio-system 8080:80
```
Open http://localhost:8080. Default credentials: `user@example.com` / `12341234`

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubeflow
kubectl get svc -n istio-system
```

uninstall.title: Remove Kubeflow
uninstall.description:
```bash
cd manifests
kustomize build example | kubectl delete -f -
```

uninstall.title: Remove namespaces
uninstall.description:
```bash
kubectl delete namespace kubeflow auth istio-system knative-serving
```

upgrade.title: Pull latest manifests
upgrade.description:
```bash
cd manifests
git fetch --tags
git checkout v1.9.1
while ! kustomize build example | kubectl apply -f -; do echo 'Retrying...'; sleep 20; done
```

troubleshooting.title: Pods stuck in ContainerCreating
troubleshooting.description:
Kubeflow requires significant resources. Ensure your cluster has at least 16GB RAM and 4 CPUs:
```bash
kubectl describe pods -n kubeflow | grep -A5 Events
```

troubleshooting.title: Istio gateway not responding
troubleshooting.description:
```bash
kubectl get svc istio-ingressgateway -n istio-system
kubectl logs -l app=istiod -n istio-system
```

troubleshooting.title: Authentication errors
troubleshooting.description:
Reset the default password:
```bash
kubectl get configmap dex -n auth -o yaml
```
Default credentials are `user@example.com` / `12341234`.

resolution.summary: Kubeflow ML platform is installed with all components including notebooks, pipelines, and model serving.

prerequisites.description: Kubernetes cluster with at least 16GB RAM and 4 CPUs. kustomize v5+ and git required.
